privileged_info_summary: Verified that the task requires configuring the Wazuh manager container ('wazuh-wazuh.manager-1') with a global agent label key 'compliance' and value 'pci_dss'. The task expects monitoring of the synthetically injected log file '/var/log/payment_app.log' and a custom rule with ID 100250 and level 12 that triggers when 'Transaction: VOID' is logged.
